close_reason: Integrated metadata flow in commit proxy finalization: updated finalize_batch to 4-arg signature, pass metadata to resolvers, extract metadata from transactions, return metadata updates. All tests updated and passing.

title: Integrate metadata flow in commit proxy finalization
